top_signals.title: Gold Holds Gain as Hopes for Iran Truce Ease Inflation Fears
top_signals.summary: Gold held a modest gain as the prospect of a US-Iran ceasefire deal eased some inflationary concerns that have weighed on bullion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Project Astra: the $420bn merger powering the US AI revolution
top_signals.summary: Proposed deal between NextEra and Dominion would cement control of US ‘data centre alley’
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
